# Valesų gerovė

Valesų gerovė is a unique Lithuanian wellness brand that bridges ancient Baltic traditions with cutting-edge biohacking technology. The brand creates a mystical 'Ancient-Future' experience, combining traditional forest remedies (like Chaga tinctures and birch bud extracts) with modern science-backed supplements and wearable health devices. The aesthetic merges deep Baltic forest imagery with digital neural networks and bio-luminescent accents, creating a distinctive dual-pathway shopping experience that respects Lithuanian heritage while embracing technological innovation.

Source: https://valesugerove.lt

---

## Discover Top Nootropics 2022 &amp; Forest Wisdom — Valesų gerovė

URL: https://valesugerove.lt
Description: Ancient Baltic remedies meet cutting-edge biohacking. Explore top nootropics 2022, herbal tinctures, and wearable health tech for peak performance.

# Ancient Baltic wellness, verified by modern biohacking.


### Discover the dual approach—forest remedies rooted in Lithuanian tradition plus science-backed supplementation and wearable-guided routines.

## Two pathways, one standard of care.


We bridge heritage ritual and measurable outcomes, honoring Lithuanian traditions while embracing scientific precision. Whether you seek the gentle wisdom of the forest or the clarity of evidence-led protocols, every product meets our uncompromising quality standards.











### Forest Rituals


Rooted in Baltic heritage, our traditional remedies honor centuries of wisdom passed through generations of Lithuanian healers and forest keepers.


- Chaga & birch traditions from ancient Baltic forests

- Seasonal use aligned with natural rhythms

- Mindful preparation rituals for deeper connection

- Gentle daily rhythm supporting holistic wellness

- Origin-first sourcing from trusted Lithuanian foragers











### Biohacking Protocols


Precision-engineered supplements and wearable-guided routines designed for measurable results, backed by rigorous scientific research and clinical evidence.


- Evidence-led nootropic stacks with verified ingredients

- Wearable-guided routines for optimal timing

- Recovery metrics tracking for continuous optimization

- Third-party ingredient verification for purity

- Careful interaction awareness and safety protocols











Not sure where to begin? Contact us for a safe starting plan.













## From forest to lab: our method.


We trace every ingredient from seasonal harvest to verified purity, honoring Lithuanian traditions while applying rigorous modern science. Each step ensures safety, potency, and respect for the natural world.




1


### Seasonal harvesting


We gather Chaga, birch buds, and forest botanicals at peak potency, following traditional Lithuanian calendars that align with lunar cycles and optimal growth phases.





2


### Gentle extraction


Cold-pressing and low-temperature methods preserve bioactive compounds without chemical solvents, maintaining the integrity of ancient remedies.





3


### Identity & purity checks


Third-party lab analysis confirms botanical identity, screens for contaminants, and validates active ingredient concentrations using modern analytical chemistry.





4


### Practical protocol guidance


We provide evidence-based dosing schedules and integration tips that fit into daily routines, bridging heritage wisdom with contemporary wellness practices.






We design routines that honor heritage and prioritize safety.























## Trusted for calm clarity and measurable progress.


Individual outcomes vary. We provide careful guidance, verified ingredients, and transparent sourcing—never exaggerated promises. Each journey is personal, and we support yours with respect for both ancient wisdom and modern verification.






### Consistent sleep rhythm restored


"After years of irregular sleep, I finally found a pattern that works. The Chaga tincture combined with their sleep protocol brought me back to waking naturally at dawn. It's gentle, not forced—exactly what I needed."


— Rūta, Vilnius





### Digestion comfort and daily ease


"The birch bud extract has transformed my mornings. No more bloating or discomfort—just steady energy throughout the day. I appreciate how they explain the science behind each ingredient without overwhelming you."


— Tomas, Kaunas





### Recovery awareness meets Lithuanian heritage


"What I love most is how they honor our Baltic traditions while giving me real data from my wearable device. Seeing my HRV improve alongside using forest remedies my grandmother would recognize—that's the perfect balance of old and new."


— Jurgita, Klaipėda














## Build your Ancient-Future routine.


Share your wellness goals and daily constraints with us. Our team will guide you through a personalized combination of traditional Baltic remedies and modern biohacking tools—always prioritizing safety and scientific verification first.

Contact Valesų gerovė
Read our verification standards

## Where Ancient Forest Meets Neural Networks — Valesų gerovė

URL: https://valesugerove.lt/about
Description: We blend centuries-old Lithuanian forest remedies with modern biohacking science. Discover our unique Ancient-Future wellness philosophy and heritage.

Where Ancient Forest Meets Neural Networks — Valesų gerovė



































































- Products Products










- About
- Science
- Contact
0














All Products

















# A Lithuanian apothecary mindset, built for the future.


We are careful curators of forest tradition and modern verification. Every remedy begins with the deep botanical knowledge passed down through Baltic generations—Chaga harvested from birch forests, wild berry extracts, and herbal preparations that have sustained our ancestors. Then we bring in the rigor: lab testing, bioavailability studies, and science-backed formulation to ensure each product delivers measurable results.


This is our 'Ancient-Future' philosophy. We don't ask you to choose between heritage wisdom and technological innovation. Instead, we bridge them—honoring the potency of traditional remedies while embracing the precision of modern biohacking. The result is a collection of top nootropics and wellness solutions that respect where we come from while supporting where we're going.













## Where folklore meets measurement.


Our journey begins in the quiet spaces between tradition and innovation—where centuries-old Lithuanian wisdom encounters the precision of modern science. We honor the rhythms of our ancestors while embracing the tools that help us understand them more deeply.


Every product we create carries this dual commitment: to preserve the integrity of our heritage while ensuring the safety and efficacy our community deserves. This is not compromise—it is the careful synthesis that defines who we are.





### Heritage


We follow seasonal rhythms, source ingredients from local ecosystems, and maintain deep respect for the ecological balance that sustains us. Our formulations honor traditional preparation methods passed down through generations of Baltic healers.









### Lab discipline


Every botanical is verified for identity and purity. We test for contaminants, standardize active compounds, and provide clear guidance on dosing and interactions. Our commitment to transparency means you always know exactly what you're taking.





We believe in clear expectations and honest communication. When you choose Valesų gerovė, you're choosing a partner who respects both the wisdom of the past and the responsibility of the present.























## Principles that guide every recommendation.


Our commitment to you is rooted in transparency, safety, and respect for the wisdom of our ancestors. Every product we recommend has been carefully evaluated against these core principles.









### Traceability


Every ingredient is sourced with complete transparency. From Lithuanian forest harvests to lab-certified supplements, we document the entire journey from origin to your hands.








### Safety-first guidance


We prioritize your well-being above all else. Each recommendation comes with clear usage guidelines, potential interactions, and science-backed safety protocols to ensure responsible biohacking.








### Respect for tradition


Baltic healing wisdom has sustained our ancestors for centuries. We honor these time-tested remedies while applying modern scientific validation, creating a bridge between ancient knowledge and contemporary wellness.














## Small team, meticulous standards.


Every product we offer passes through careful hands—researchers who understand both forest wisdom and laboratory precision. Our team curates, tests, and educates, ensuring that each tincture, supplement, and device meets the highest standards of quality and authenticity. We believe in transparency, traceability, and the power of informed choices.









### Herbal traditions researcher


Bridges ancient Baltic forest remedies with modern phytochemistry. Specializes in Chaga, birch, and pine extracts, ensuring traditional preparation methods align with contemporary safety and efficacy standards.








### Nutrition science advisor


Evaluates every supplement and nootropic formula against peer-reviewed research. Translates complex biochemistry into clear guidance, helping customers understand how each product supports cognitive performance and metabolic health.








### Quality & sourcing lead


Oversees every step from forest harvest to final packaging. Verifies supplier credentials, third-party lab testing, and ethical sourcing practices. Ensures transparency and traceability for every ingredient and device we offer.








### Community guidance


Listens to customer questions, shares educational resources, and builds trust through honest conversations. Connects ancient wisdom seekers with biohacking enthusiasts, fostering a community rooted in curiosity and care.













## Ask for a routine that fits your body and schedule.


Share your wellness goals, sensitivities, and daily constraints with us. Whether you're exploring ancient Baltic remedies or modern biohacking protocols, we'll help you find a careful starting point that honors both tradition and science.

Contact










Empowering your journey to optimal health through science-backed wellness and biohacking solutions.

## Alpha Brain Reddit Reviews &amp; Research Backed — Valesų gerovė

URL: https://valesugerove.lt/science
Description: Science-backed supplements and alpha brain reddit insights. Explore clinical research behind our Chaga tinctures, nootropics, and biohacking innovations.

Alpha Brain Reddit Reviews & Research Backed — Valesų gerovė



































































- Products Products










- About
- Science
- Contact
0














All Products













# Verification standards and responsible guidance.


At Valesų gerovė, we bridge ancestral Lithuanian wisdom with contemporary research protocols. Every recommendation—from traditional Chaga tinctures to modern nootropics—undergoes rigorous sourcing verification and evidence review. Our approach combines ethnobotanical heritage with peer-reviewed studies, creating pragmatic protocols that honor both Baltic forest knowledge and biohacking science.


All information provided is for educational purposes and should not be considered medical advice. If you have existing health conditions, take medications, or are pregnant or nursing, please consult a qualified healthcare professional before starting any new supplement or wellness protocol. Our team is here to guide, but your physician knows your unique health situation best.















## Traditional remedies vs modern stacks—how we combine them.


Both pathways offer profound benefits when applied thoughtfully. Our approach respects the wisdom of Baltic forest traditions while embracing the precision of contemporary biohacking—creating personalized wellness plans that honor your unique needs.







Consideration
Traditional Forest Remedy Approach
Modern Biohacking Approach




Primary intent
Restore balance through seasonal alignment; support the body's natural rhythms with plant wisdom passed down through generations
Optimize specific biomarkers and performance metrics; achieve measurable improvements in energy, cognition, and recovery


Timing & seasonality
Deeply tied to harvest cycles—spring birch sap, summer herbs, autumn mushrooms, winter roots; each season brings its own medicine
Protocol-driven schedules based on circadian biology, fasting windows, and personal data; less dependent on external seasons


Typical evidence sources
Centuries of empirical use, herbalist knowledge, ethnobotanical records, and anecdotal family traditions
Clinical trials, peer-reviewed studies, quantified self-experiments, and real-time wearable device feedback


Measurement
Subjective wellness indicators—how you feel, sleep quality, energy levels, mental clarity observed over weeks or months
Objective biomarkers—blood panels, HRV tracking, sleep architecture data, cognitive test scores, continuous glucose monitoring


Safety considerations
Generally gentle with long safety history; requires proper plant identification and awareness of individual sensitivities or allergies
Highly controlled dosing with known safety profiles; potential for supplement interactions and need for professional guidance with advanced stacks


Who it may not suit
Those seeking rapid, quantifiable results; individuals who prefer standardized protocols over intuitive, seasonal approaches
Those overwhelmed by data tracking; individuals seeking holistic, spiritual connection rather than optimization metrics


How we recommend starting
Begin with one seasonal remedy (like Chaga tea or birch bud extract); observe how your body responds over 4-6 weeks before adding more
Establish baseline measurements first; introduce one supplement or device at a time; track changes systematically for 2-3 weeks







### Primary intent


Traditional Forest Remedy

Restore balance through seasonal alignment; support the body's natural rhythms with plant wisdom passed down through generations



Modern Biohacking

Optimize specific biomarkers and performance metrics; achieve measurable improvements in energy, cognition, and recovery






### Timing & seasonality


Traditional Forest Remedy

Deeply tied to harvest cycles—spring birch sap, summer herbs, autumn mushrooms, winter roots; each season brings its own medicine



Modern Biohacking

Protocol-driven schedules based on circadian biology, fasting windows, and personal data; less dependent on external seasons






### Typical evidence sources


Traditional Forest Remedy

Centuries of empirical use, herbalist knowledge, ethnobotanical records, and anecdotal family traditions



Modern Biohacking

Clinical trials, peer-reviewed studies, quantified self-experiments, and real-time wearable device feedback






### Measurement


Traditional Forest Remedy

Subjective wellness indicators—how you feel, sleep quality, energy levels, mental clarity observed over weeks or months



Modern Biohacking

Objective biomarkers—blood panels, HRV tracking, sleep architecture data, cognitive test scores, continuous glucose monitoring






### Safety considerations


Traditional Forest Remedy

Generally gentle with long safety history; requires proper plant identification and awareness of individual sensitivities or allergies



Modern Biohacking

Highly controlled dosing with known safety profiles; potential for supplement interactions and need for professional guidance with advanced stacks






### Who it may not suit


Traditional Forest Remedy

Those seeking rapid, quantifiable results; individuals who prefer standardized protocols over intuitive, seasonal approaches



Modern Biohacking

Those overwhelmed by data tracking; individuals seeking holistic, spiritual connection rather than optimization metrics






### How we recommend starting


Traditional Forest Remedy

Begin with one seasonal remedy (like Chaga tea or birch bud extract); observe how your body responds over 4-6 weeks before adding more



Modern Biohacking

Establish baseline measurements first; introduce one supplement or device at a time; track changes systematically for 2-3 weeks








The most effective wellness journey often weaves both pathways together—honoring ancestral wisdom while leveraging modern precision. We help you discover which combination serves your unique constitution, lifestyle, and goals, creating a personalized plan that feels both grounded and forward-thinking.













## What we document and why it matters.


Every product in our catalog undergoes rigorous verification. We record supplier origins, test for contaminants, and document the scientific rationale behind each formulation. This transparency ensures you receive safe, effective supplements backed by evidence and ethical sourcing.







### Identity confirmation


We verify botanical species through DNA barcoding and chemical fingerprinting, ensuring each herb matches its label claim. Certificates of analysis are stored for every batch.






### Contaminant awareness


Third-party labs test for heavy metals, pesticides, and microbial contamination. We publish limits of detection and actual measured values for transparency.






### Batch notes


Each production run receives a unique identifier linking to harvest date, extraction method, and storage conditions. You can trace your supplement from field to bottle.






### Supplier traceability


We maintain direct relationships with foragers and farms, documenting geographic origin and harvesting practices. Ethical wildcrafting and sustainable cultivation are non-negotiable.






### Protocol rationale


Every formulation is backed by peer-reviewed research. We cite studies, explain dosage selection, and outline the biological mechanisms behind each ingredient's effects.






### Interaction caution


We document known contraindications, drug interactions, and potential side effects. Our database cross-references medications and health conditions to flag safety concerns proactively.














## Common questions.


We've gathered answers to the most frequently asked questions about combining ancient Baltic remedies with modern biohacking practices. These responses are designed to help you navigate your wellness journey safely and thoughtfully.






### Can I combine forest extracts with supplements?


In many cases, yes—traditional extracts like Chaga tinctures and birch bud preparations can complement modern supplements. However, it's essential to understand potential interactions. We recommend starting with one category at a time and monitoring how your body responds. If you're taking prescription medications or have specific health conditions, please consult with a healthcare professional before combining remedies. Our team can provide guidance on timing and dosing to minimize any potential conflicts.





### How do you think about medications and interactions?


We take medication interactions very seriously. Some forest botanicals can affect how your body processes pharmaceuticals—for example, certain adaptogens may influence blood pressure or blood sugar regulation. We always recommend informing your doctor about any herbal supplements you're considering. Our product descriptions include known interaction warnings, but they're not exhaustive. When in doubt, schedule a consultation with a healthcare provider who understands both traditional remedies and modern pharmacology.





### How soon should I expect changes?


This varies significantly based on what you're addressing and which products you're using. Some nootropics and biohacking devices may show effects within days—improved focus, better sleep tracking data, or enhanced recovery metrics. Traditional forest extracts often work more gradually, with noticeable shifts appearing over 2-4 weeks of consistent use. We encourage keeping a simple journal to track subtle changes in energy, mood, and physical markers. Remember that wellness is a journey, not a destination, and sustainable change takes time.





### Do wearables replace intuition?


Absolutely not—wearables are tools that enhance, rather than replace, your body's wisdom. The best approach combines objective data from devices with subjective awareness of how you feel. Your HRV reading might indicate stress, but only you know if that stress is productive or harmful. We view technology as a modern extension of the intuitive practices our ancestors used—observing patterns, respecting natural rhythms, and making adjustments based on lived experience. Use the data to inform your choices, but always listen to your body first.





### What is a safe starting routine?


We recommend beginning with just one or two products and establishing a baseline for at least two weeks. A gentle starting point might be a morning adaptogen tincture paired with basic sleep tracking. Avoid the temptation to implement everything at once—this makes it impossible to identify what's actually helping. Start with the lowest recommended dose, especially for concentrated extracts. Pay attention to how you feel, and increase gradually only if needed. If you experience any adverse reactions, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional.





### How do you handle sensitivities?


Individual sensitivities are common and completely valid. We provide detailed ingredient lists and sourcing information for all our products, including potential allergens and cross-contamination risks. If you have known sensitivities to specific plants or compounds, please review product details carefully or contact us before purchasing. For those with multiple chemical sensitivities, we suggest starting with single-ingredient products rather than complex formulations. We're happy to recommend alternatives or create a customized approach that respects your body's unique needs.













## Get a cautious, personalized starting plan.


Share your wellness goals and any constraints with us, and we'll create a conservative first step that respects both ancient wisdom and modern science. Whether you're exploring herbal tinctures or top nootropics, we'll guide you safely.

Contact










Empowering your journey to optimal health through science-backed wellness and biohacking solutions.

# Contact Valesų gerovė.


Whether you're exploring ancient forest remedies or seeking guidance on modern biohacking protocols, we're here to help you craft a wellness routine that honors both tradition and measurement. Reach out with questions about sensitivities, product combinations, or how to blend Lithuanian heritage wisdom with cutting-edge health optimization.







We typically respond within 24 hours on weekdays. Your inquiry and personal health information remain confidential and are never shared with third parties.















Name



Email



Phone



Message






I have read and agree to the  Terms & Conditions  and  Privacy Policy



Send message






## What to include for the best guidance.


Share your wellness goals, current sleep and stress patterns, any dietary constraints or known sensitivities. If you track metrics with wearable devices, include relevant data points—we blend ancient wisdom with modern biohacking insights.


For urgent medical situations, please contact your healthcare provider immediately. Our consultations complement, not replace, professional medical advice.














## Direct contact.







### Email


info@valesugerove.lt







### Phone


+37045435643







### Location


Žalgirio g. 90-6th floor, Vilnius, 09303, Lithuania


Mon–Fri: 9:00–18:00 Sat: 10:00–15:00












## Where we work.








We focus primarily on serving clients throughout Lithuania, bringing ancient Baltic wisdom and modern biohacking technology to your doorstep. Remote guidance and consultations are available for those outside our immediate service area. For scheduling and personalized wellness plans, please reach out through our contact form—we'll work with you to find the best approach for your biohacking journey.













## Start with one message.


Reach out with your questions or intentions. We offer cautious, respectful guidance rooted in both ancient wisdom and modern science—no quick fixes, only thoughtful support for your unique path.

## Return Policy

URL: https://valesugerove.lt/return-policy
Description: Return policy - your rights for returns and exchanges

Return Policy - Valesų gerovė








































































- Products Products










- About
- Science
- Contact
0













All Products










# Return Policy


Last Updated: 6/13/2026



At Valesų gerovė, we want you to be satisfied with your purchase. This policy outlines your rights for returns and refunds.


## 1. Return Window


You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund.


- Items must be unused and in original condition

- Items must be in original packaging

- Receipt or proof of purchase required




## 2. Non-Returnable Items


- Perishable goods

- Custom or personalized items

- Digital products and opened software

- Personal hygiene products that have been opened




## 3. Damaged or Defective Items


If you receive a damaged or defective item, contact us within 48 hours for a full refund including shipping costs.


## 4. Contact Us



For returns or questions:


Email: info@valesugerove.lt


Phone: +37045435643


Address: Žalgirio g. 90-6th floor, Vilnius

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://valesugerove.lt/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy



















































- Products Products










- About
- Science

0














All Products









# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  3/14/2026



Valesų gerovė ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: Valesų gerovė

- Email: info@valesugerove.lt

- Phone: +37045435643

- Address: Žalgirio g. 90-6th floor, Vilnius, 09303, Lithuania



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice












Empowering your journey to optimal health through science-backed wellness and biohacking solutions.

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://valesugerove.lt/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement



















































- Products Products










- About
- Science
- Contact
0














All Products









# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  March 14, 2026



Valesų gerovė is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: Valesų gerovė

- Email: info@valesugerove.lt

- Phone: +37045435643



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.












Empowering your journey to optimal health through science-backed wellness and biohacking solutions.

## Terms & Conditions

Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

- Products Products

All Products









# Terms of Use



Last updated:  March 14, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - Valesų gerovė

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - wellness and biohacking provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


Valesų gerovė provides wellness and biohacking through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by Valesų gerovė. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: Valesų gerovė

- Email: info@valesugerove.lt

- Phone: +37045435643

- Address: Žalgirio g. 90-6th floor, Vilnius, 09303, Lithuania
